text.message: Dude I am in last place with no city what’s your problem
i feel like ive gone for everyone equally
there is beauty in the world i promise
everyone in this lobby is so angry
Red and blue play like they are teams with orange
black is in on it too
alright light blue. you and i in last
Im gonna take a shower. ITS talking too long
Orange i think blue is also in our team
can the team help me out a lil more
i feel like im getting left behind
No the team is just pick on me and keep ie in last
I just saw that you still play
hehe i have a lot of cards
I need 2 more boats to block red
i want this game to end
Orange you have really destroyed my game from start to finisg
Red had 4 cards and chose me
I was having fun till now
Its about 2nd place not extending the game
Bro you really took my best card
i saw 4 and got tunnel vision i didnt realize he also had 4
I don’t hate you I know you hate yourself that’s enough
its an ugly world we live in
enemies to lovers and back to enemies
Like your mom with your dad
Look it’s a good game down to the wires
Really spied me when red settles to win
Green needs to cut reds boat  road
and ur insulting my mom and dad now!?
man its getting tough out here
i thought we had a fun thing going
yall gotta stop letting me steal these metros
you know what's funny... i have a merchant. i forgot to use it
i know but i could have won before
I have no more settle or city
well hey this game has been fun
i feel like we all become good friends
Welp my assent that blue and Red’s play helped orange was accurate
